page.title: Advanced Passive Voice
page.subtitle_html: Advanced Passive Voice — B2 passive voice patterns across perfect, continuous, modal and formal structures.
page.subtitle_text: B2 passive voice patterns across perfect, continuous, modal and formal structures.

blocks.body: {"level":"B2","intro":"Advanced Passive Voice: Advanced Passive Voice узагальнює B2 пасив: perfect passive, continuous passive, modal passive, get-passive and formal passive patterns.","rules":[{"label":"Perfect passive","text":"Use has / have / had been + V3 for results and earlier completed actions.","example":"The report has been reviewed."},{"label":"Continuous passive","text":"Use is / was being + V3 when the process is in focus.","example":"The road is being repaired."},{"label":"Formal passive","text":"Use passive patterns when the action or result is more important than the agent.","example":"Applicants will be contacted by email."}]}

blocks.heading: B2 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English B2 lesson package.
